summary: This Excel document contains internal performance test results comparing AI models (Haiku, GPT3.5, Opus) using generic conversation personas like musicians and cooking. It includes system prompts defining multi-step interaction flows and numerical quality review scores for each model. The file is located in the Analytics folder and focuses on technical benchmarking rather than healthcare-specific use cases.
path_to_original: /Users/eduardolizana/Documents/6. Companies /1. Companies with Rodrigo/KeepMeCompany/6. Analytics/2. Performance Tests/Analythics - Haiku vs GPT3.5 Turbo.xlsx
sniff_test_notes: Test personas (cooking, musicians) do not align with the company's core NHS elderly care mission, indicating early-stage generic development or placeholder testing.
